creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: antoine
Date: Sun Dec  1 20:03:09 2013
New Revision: 335437
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335437

Log:
  - Update to 0.9
  - Stage support
  - Use OPTIONS helpers
  
  PR:		ports/183928
  Submitted by:	Jake Smith (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/phpipam/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/phpipam/distinfo
  head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-descr
  head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net-mgmt/phpipam/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/phpipam/Makefile	Sun Dec  1 19:54:40 2013	(r335436)
+++ head/net-mgmt/phpipam/Makefile	Sun Dec  1 20:03:09 2013	(r335437)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	phpipam
-PORTVERSION=	0.8
+PORTVERSION=	0.9
 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
@@ -27,34 +27,24 @@ SUB_LIST=	DISTNAME=${DISTNAME}
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	LDAP
 
-USE_MYSQL=	yes
-USE_PHP=	ctype mysqli session gmp
+USE_PHP=	ctype gettext gmp json mysqli pcntl session simplexml
+LDAP_USE=	PHP=ldap
 WANT_PHP_WEB=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MLDAP}
-USE_PHP+=	ldap
-.endif
-
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
 pre-install:
-	@${MV} ${WRKSRC}/${CFGFILE} ${WRKSRC}/${CFGFILE}.sample
+	@if [ -f ${WRKSRC}/${CFGFILE} ]; then \
+	${MV} ${WRKSRC}/${CFGFILE} ${WRKSRC}/${CFGFILE}.sample ; \
+	fi
 
 do-install:
 	cd ${WRKSRC} ; \
 	for src in $$( ${FIND} . ! -name '*.orig') ; do \
-		dst=${WWWDIR}$${src#.} ; \
+		dst=${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}$${src#.} ; \
 		if ${TEST} -d "$$src" ; then \
 			${MKDIR} "$$dst" ; \
 		else \
-			${INSTALL_DATA} -o root -g wheel "$$src" "$$dst" ; \
+			${INSTALL_DATA} "$$src" "$$dst" ; \
 		fi \
 	done
 
-post-install:
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
-
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net-mgmt/phpipam/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/phpipam/distinfo	Sun Dec  1 19:54:40 2013	(r335436)
+++ head/net-mgmt/phpipam/distinfo	Sun Dec  1 20:03:09 2013	(r335437)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (phpipam-0.8.tar) = 5038afefef5b376cf4ed382bb45b15ba48fa58cb0bd9813c4a57866f58bf8f88
-SIZE (phpipam-0.8.tar) = 3996672
+SHA256 (phpipam-0.9.tar) = 1158ba32649727e57d48f87d51303c55f3dab8c77916a3a68c0bf5b1d7eb65f8
+SIZE (phpipam-0.9.tar) = 4907008

Modified: head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-descr	Sun Dec  1 19:54:40 2013	(r335436)
+++ head/net-mgmt/phpipam/pkg-descr	Sun Dec  1 20:03:09 2013	(r335437)
@@ -1,23 +1,18 @@
 phpipam is an open-source web IP address management application.
 Its goal is to provide light and simple IP address management
-application. It is ajax-based using jQuery libraries, it uses php
-scripts and javascript and some HTML5/CSS3 features, so some modern
-browser is preferred to be able to display javascript quickly and
-correctly...
+application. It is ajax-based using jQuery libraries, php scripts,
+javascript and some HTML5/CSS3 features.
 
-Features and tools:
-- Section / Subnet separation
-- Subnet nesting;
-- IPv4/IPv6 support
-- Displays free range and number of clients
-- Subnet statistics
-- User management
+- IPv4 / IPv6 address management
+- ICMP status updates, subnet scanning and status showing
+- Domain authentication (AD) / OpenLDAP authentication
+- Visual subnet display
+- VRF support
+- VLAN management
+- RIPE import
+- Import / export XLS files
 - E-Mail notification with IP details
-- Import IP addresses from XLS / CSV file
-- Export IP database to XLS file
-- IPv4/IPv6 calculator
-- Search IP database
-- IP request module
-- Custom IP address fields
+- IP database search
+- Custom IP/subnet/userVLAN address fields
 
 WWW: http://phpipam.net/
